zh.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷蘭武特雷特武特雷特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen於1562年4月出生在荷蘭藍德時，她的父親Willem van Essen26歲，母親Haesgen van Driel22歲。她於1590年9月與Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje在荷蘭藍德文-德貝藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1619年10月在她的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷兰武特雷特武特雷特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen于1562年4月出生在荷兰藍德时，她的父亲Willem van Essen26岁，母亲Haesgen van Driel22岁。她于1590年9月与Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje在荷兰藍德文-德貝藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1619年10月在她的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Essen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Essen, for example in the Ruhr.

variants.name: Esson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans.
Scottish (Aberdeenshire): from a shortened and altered form of the Gaelic personal name Adamh (see Adam ). This surname was sometimes confused with 2 below.
English and Scottish: variant of Easton , although in some instances the Scottish surname may reflect the reverse process, in which the name in 1 above has acquired an intrusive -t-.

variants.name: Essman
meanings: Americanized form of German Essmann: habitational name, a variant of Essen , with the suffix man ‘man’ or nickname for a big eater, from the agent derivative of Middle High German ezzen ‘to eat’.

historicEvents.description: William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
The Dutch declared their independence from Spain.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."
"English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."

Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. English explorer Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. Hudson sailed for the Dutch East India Company in search of the Northwest Passage, a water route linking the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans, when he sailed up the present-day Hudson River.

en.lifeSummary: When Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen was born in April 1562, in Zeeland, Netherlands, her father, Willem van Essen, was 26 and her mother, Haesgen van Driel, was 22. She married Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje in September 1590, in Schouwen-Duiveland, Zeeland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in October 1619, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen est née en avril 1562, à Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Willem van Essen, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Haesgen van Driel, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje en septembre 1590, à Schouwen-Duiveland, Zélande, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en octobre 1619, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen im April 1562 in Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Willem van Essen 26 und ihre Mutter Haesgen van Driel 22. Sie hat im September 1590 in Schouwen-Duiveland, Seeland, Niederlande Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Oktober 1619 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen è nata il nel aprile 1562 nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Willem van Essen, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Haesgen van Driel, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje nel settembre 1590, nel Schouwen-Duiveland, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel ottobre 1619, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランド
ja.Zierikzee, Schouwen-Duiveland, Zeeland,: オランダゼエランドスチオウウエン-ドウイベランド
ja.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: オランダウトレチトウトレチト
ja.lifeSummary: Majaretta Gertstad Van Essenが1562年4月にオランダゼエランドで生まれた時，父Willem van Essenは26歳，母Haesgen van Drielは22歳であった。1590年9月にオランダゼエランドスチオウウエン-ドウイベランドでHenri Jacobus Losea Loosjeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1619年10月に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen(이)가 1562년 4월 네덜란드 제랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Willem van Essen(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Haesgen van Driel(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1590년 9월 네덜란드 제랜드 슈우웬-드이벨랜드에서 Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1619년 10월 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Apr 1562–Oct 1619: 1562 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сар–1619 оны Аравдугаар сар

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen nasceu em abril de 1562, em Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, Willem van Essen, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Haesgen van Driel, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje em setembro de 1590, em Schouwen-Duiveland, Zelandia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1619, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen родилась апрель 1562 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Willem van Essen было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Haesgen van Driel, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje сентябрь 1590 г. в местности щоувен-дуивеланд, зиланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла октябрь 1619 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen nació en abril de 1562, en Zeeland, Países Bajos, su papá, Willem van Essen, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Haesgen van Driel, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje en septiembre de 1590, en Schouwen-Duiveland, Zeeland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en octubre de 1619, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
